title: eriolobus kansuensis
intro: Eriolobus kansuensis, also known as Kan Su Wu or Kansu Medicinal Plant, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. It has been used for centuries in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriolobus kansuensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and promoting digestion, among others. In herbal preparations, Eriolobus kansuensis is often combined with other herbs to create decoctions, infusions, and pills that can be used to treat various health conditions.
